result.stdout:
BusyTag Device Manager CLI
==========================
BusyTag Device Manager CLI
==========================
Usage: busytag-cli [command] [arguments]

Device Management:
  scan, list              - Scan for BusyTag devices
  connect <port>          - Connect to device on specified port
  info <port>             - Show device information
  restart <port>          - Restart the device

Display Control:
  color <port> <color> [brightness] [led_bits]
                          - Set solid color (name/hex/RGB)
  brightness <port> <level>
                          - Set display brightness (0-100)
  pattern <port> <name_or_number> [count]
                          - Set LED pattern by name or number
                            count: 1-254 (play count times), 255 (infinite)
  show <port> <filename>  - Display image file

File Management:
  upload <port> <file>    - Upload file to device
  download <port> <filename> <dest>
                          - Download file from device
  delete <port> <filename>
                          - Delete file from device
  files <port>            - List files on device

Storage Operations:
  storage <port>          - Show storage information
  format <port> --force   - Format device storage (DANGER!)

Recovery:
  recover [port]          - Erase + flash firmware (full recovery)
  recover [port] --no-erase
                          - Flash without erasing first
  recover [port] --firmware-dir <path>
                          - Use custom firmware binaries
  recover [port] --esptool <path>
                          - Specify esptool executable path

Other:
  version, -v, --version  - Show version information
  help, -h, --help        - Show this help message

Color Formats:
  Named colors: red, green, blue, yellow, cyan, magenta, white, off
  Hex colors: FF0000, #FF0000 (red)
  RGB values: 255,0,0 (red)

Examples:
  busytag-cli scan
  busytag-cli connect COM3
  busytag-cli info /dev/ttyUSB0
  busytag-cli color COM3 red 75
  busytag-cli color COM3 FF0000 50 127
  busytag-cli color COM3 255,128,0
  busytag-cli brightness COM3 80
  busytag-cli pattern COM3 "Police 1" 5
  busytag-cli pattern COM3 1 255
  busytag-cli upload COM3 "photo.png"
  busytag-cli files COM3
  busytag-cli show COM3 photo.png
  busytag-cli storage COM3
  busytag-cli delete COM3 old_image.png
  busytag-cli format COM3 --force

Run without arguments for interactive mode.

BusyTag Device Manager CLI
==========================
BusyTag Device Manager CLI
==========================
Usage: busytag-cli [command] [arguments]

Device Management:
  scan, list              - Scan for BusyTag devices
  connect <port>          - Connect to device on specified port
  info <port>             - Show device information
  restart <port>          - Restart the device

Display Control:

  brightness <port> <level>

  show <port> <filename>  - Display image file

Storage Operations:
